_meta.description: Reference dataset for the open-source peptide reconstitution calculator. Identity fields (molecularWeightDa, pubchemCid) are taken from PubChem, cited per compound. Dose fields are a research reference only: studyDose/studyNote summarize doses used in published studies (see peptidesdirect.io/research/dosing for full citations); communityDose summarizes what is discussed in peptide forums.
_meta.disclaimer: Reference only. Study doses = doses used in cited studies; community doses = what peptide forums discuss. Neither is a recommendation, dosing guidance or medical advice; most compounds have no established human protocol.

peptides.name: BPC-157
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks

peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks

peptides.studyDose: under 10 mcg/mL to 3.2 mg/mL (in vitro / human topical)

peptides.name: Thymosin Alpha-1
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks
peptides.studyDose: 900 mcg/m2 to 1.6 mg per dose (human trials)

peptides.name: Thymalin
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks
peptides.note: Thymalin is a thymus polypeptide fraction, not a single defined molecule, so it has no single PubChem CID and no single molecular weight. Do not confuse with thymulin (nonathymulin, PubChem CID 3085284), which is a different compound.

peptides.name: Retatrutide
peptides.diluent: Bacteriostatic water, near-neutral (test water pH; acidic water is the top cause of a milky vial)
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks

peptides.name: Cagrilintide
peptides.diluent: Acetic-acid water then top up with bacteriostatic water (amylin analog, acidic ~pH 4)
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks
peptides.plasmaHalfLife: ~159-195 h, about one week (Enebo et al., Lancet 2021)

peptides.name: AOD-9604
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks

peptides.name: IGF-1 LR3
peptides.diluent: Dilute acetic acid, then bacteriostatic water (acetate-buffered, acidic ~pH 3-4)
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks
peptides.note: IGF-1 LR3 (Long R3 IGF-1) is an 83-residue engineered analog of insulin-like growth factor 1 with an N-terminal extension and an Arg3 substitution. It has no single clean PubChem CID, so molecular weight is left uncited rather than invented.

peptides.name: GLOW (GHK-Cu / BPC-157 / TB-500)
peptides.reconstitutionPhClass: copper complex, neutral, do not acidify
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks
peptides.note: Blend of three peptides; no single molecular weight. Contains the GHK copper complex, so do not acidify.

peptides.name: KLOW (GHK-Cu / BPC-157 / TB-500 / KPV)
peptides.reconstitutionPhClass: copper complex, neutral, do not acidify
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks
peptides.note: Blend of four peptides; no single molecular weight. Contains the GHK copper complex, so do not acidify.

peptides.name: CJC-1295 / Ipamorelin
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks
peptides.note: Blend of two peptides; no single molecular weight.

peptides.name: BPC-157 / TB-500
peptides.storage: lyophilized: -20C long-term / 2-8C fridge short-term, keep sealed and protected from light; reconstituted: 2-8C fridge, use within ~2-4 weeks
peptides.note: Blend of two peptides in a 1:1 ratio (5 mg / 5 mg at 10 mg total, 10 mg / 10 mg at 20 mg total); no single molecular weight.
